title: Bash command execution view component with output display
purpose: Displays the command, description, and output of a bash tool execution in the agent chat interface.

steps.content: Extract the command and description from the tool input.
Collect stdout and stderr output chunks from the tool progress.
Determine if the tool execution has completed.
Construct the final stdout text from either the tool output or collected chunks.
Render the command prompt, description, output panel, and any error messages.
